metadata.purpose: Track international swimmers on D1 rosters - key for Michael's dual citizenship recruiting angle

israeli_ncaa_olympians.name: Martin Kartavi
israeli_ncaa_olympians.notes: Recruited specifically from Israel by Coach Gangloff

israeli_ncaa_olympians.name: Adam Maraana
israeli_ncaa_olympians.notes: Joined with Kartavi - UNC has active Israeli pipeline

israeli_ncaa_olympians.name: Ayla Spitz
israeli_ncaa_olympians.notes: Women's team - shows Northwestern values Israeli athletes

israeli_ncaa_olympians.name: Andrea Murez
israeli_ncaa_olympians.notes: Longest-serving Israeli NCAA swimmer - Stanford model

israeli_ncaa_olympians.name: Itay Goldfaden
israeli_ncaa_olympians.notes: Showed SEC teams recruit Israeli swimmers

6ft3_plus.name: Michael Phelps
6ft3_plus.notes: Bowman coached Phelps - EXACT MATCH for Michael's build

UNC Chapel Hill.notes: MOST ACTIVE Israeli recruiting - Coach Gangloff specifically seeks dual-citizenship

Northwestern.notes: Current Israeli Olympian - excellent recruiting fit

recruiting_strategy_for_michael.primary_angle: Dual US-Israeli citizenship = unique recruiting advantage
talking_points: Can represent Israel at Olympics (smaller competition pool)
Proven pathway: 7+ NCAA swimmers → Israeli Olympic team
Coaches value diversity and international exposure
recruiting_strategy_for_michael.email_subject_template: Michael Shapira - 6'4" Dual US-Israeli Citizen | Class 2027
recruiting_strategy_for_michael.sample_opening: As a dual US-Israeli citizen, I'm following the path of Martin Kartavi and David Gerchik who've shown that NCAA swimmers can compete for Israel at the Olympic level...
